_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
**LEED v5 Sector-Specific Warehouse Credits (USGBC)**
Status: In active development. The USGBC source confirms that "Sector specific Project Priority credits are continuously being developed and will be released in the Project Priority Library." No scheduled release date is published in the sourced material.
Impact: Credits specific to warehouse and distribution center operations will define performance benchmarks that institutional landlords will adopt as lease conditions. The workspace should monitor the USGBC Project Priority Library for release of warehouse-specific credits that may affect facility selection criteria.
*Source: USGBC, "Applying LEED to Warehouse and Distribution Center Projects," March 2026.*

**EU EPBD Recast — Member State Transposition**
The EU EPBD recast has been adopted at EU level. Member states are transposing it into national law. The workspace's European facility obligations will be set by the transposed national standards in each jurisdiction where it operates. No single transposition date applies across all member states.
*Source: EU EPBD Recast overview, https://energy.ec.europa.eu/topics/energy-efficiency/energy-efficient-buildings/energy-performance-buildings-directive_en*

**Australia NABERS — Warehouse Expansion Under Consultation**
The NABERS rating system (Australia) is under consultation for expansion to warehouses. No confirmed date for mandatory warehouse application has been published.
*Source: NABERS, https://www.nabers.gov.au*

---
